remarks.zh: 窗户制作的多行结果示例。根据需要调整偏移量。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.
remarks.ms: Contoh keluaran multi-baris untuk fabrikasi tingkap. Laraskan offset jika perlu. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Contoh keluaran multi-baris untuk pembuatan jendela. Sesuaikan offset sesuai kebutuhan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: ตัวอย่างผลลัพธ์หลายบรรทัดสำหรับการผลิตหน้าต่าง ปรับค่าออฟเซ็ตตามที่จำเป็น (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Ví dụ về đầu ra nhiều dòng cho sản xuất cửa sổ. Điều chỉnh offset nếu cần. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Halimbawa ng multi-line na output para sa paggawa ng bintana. Ayusin ang mga offset kung kinakailangan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပေါင်းစုံဖြတ် တံခန်းများအတွက်၁ဥပမာ။ မလိုက်ဖက်မှုများ ထိန်းညှိပါ။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: ឧទាហរណ៍នៃលទ្ធផលជាច្រើនជួរសម្រាប់ការបង្កើតបង្អួច កែសម្រួលច្រកនៃជាំប្រសិនបើចាំបាច់។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຕົວຢ່າງຂອງຄວາມລວມຫລາຍສາຍສໍາລັບການຂຽນໃຫ້ນ່ຽວຫນ້າຕ່າງຂືຼນທຽບຕາມຖ້ວນທີ່ຈໍາເປັນ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: 窓製作用の複数行出力の例。必要に応じてオフセットを調整してください。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 창 제작을 위한 멀티라인 출력 예제입니다. 필요에 따라 오프셋을 조정하세요. (AI translated, please check)

remarks.fr: Exemple de sortie multi-ligne pour la fabrication de fenêtres. Ajustez les décalages si nécessaire. (AI translated, please check)
